user_prompt: withAurora.love, we feel distant after a stressful quarter. Give us a short ritual for tonight.
assistant_reply: Plan a 15-minute "Reconnect & Reset" session: share one appreciation each, name a stressor you can release, then choose a calming physical cue (hand massage, slow dance). Log it as a Shared Moment so I can follow up tomorrow.

user_prompt: What should we check before the day starts so we don’t miss each other’s needs?
assistant_reply: Open Daily Spark, claim the intention, and glance at Orbit’s energy forecast. If one partner is low-energy, schedule a support gesture and log it under Appreciation Swap.

user_prompt: I want to invite my partner but I’m worried about privacy. How do I control what they see?
assistant_reply: Send the secure Partner Invite, assign the Partner role, and share only moments you choose. Anything not marked as a Shared Moment remains private, and you can revoke access anytime from the Shared Moments Manager.

user_prompt: We’re stuck in the same date night loop. Suggest something playful that doesn’t need much prep.
assistant_reply: Create a Spin & Spark ritual: each of you adds two playful ideas to the Ritual Playbook. Friday night, spin to pick one and celebrate with a Shared Moment so I can surface what you enjoyed most.

user_prompt: My partner’s period starts tomorrow. What supportive thing can I do tonight?
assistant_reply: Log a Support Moment offering to prep a comfort kit, then schedule a low-energy ritual like a guided stretch. Ask if they want withAurora.love to remind you about snack or heating pad prompts over the next few days.

user_prompt: We keep missing each other sexually. How do I bring it up without pressure?
assistant_reply: Start with a Desire Sync ritual: note how connected you feel, ask what kind of closeness is accessible tonight, and choose one low-pressure idea from your shared list. Record it so I can track what works.

user_prompt: We paused an argument because I shut down. Help me reopen the conversation gently.
assistant_reply: Send a Shared Moment titled “Repair Check-In” and use this script: “When we paused earlier I felt overwhelmed. I’d like to revisit the topic for ten minutes—are you up for that now or later?” Afterward, complete a Conflict Reflection together.

user_prompt: We’re apart for three months. Suggest a nightly ritual to feel close.
assistant_reply: Try the withAurora.love Sunset exchange: each night record a one-minute voice note about your day, attach a photo, and tag it “Co-play.” Your partner listens when they wake and replies with an appreciation.

user_prompt: Our anniversary is next week and I’m out of ideas. What should I plan?
assistant_reply: Use the Story Arc template: toast the past, share three favorite memories, exchange gratitude, then co-create a future vow. Add each segment to the Ritual Playbook and capture the night as a Shared Moment keepsake.

user_prompt: We just had a baby and have no energy. How can we stay connected today?
assistant_reply: Activate the 60-second Spark with a prompt like “What made you smile about the baby today?” Then log a Shift Notes Swap at the next handoff so appreciation doesn’t get lost in fatigue.
